TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_laluma'an_nu_Palatiyun, title = laluma'an_nu_Palatiyun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/laluma'an_nu_Palatiyun} }

S.FORM: dadiw nu sulda atu lamal(Amilika: A Song of Ice and Fire), u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u kungku nu nilalamelan nu laylay atu malawlaay nadatengan. izaw ku pituay a pu nu ulic nu nida. malagiki nu HBO i 2011 a mihcaan. (Amilika a kamu: House of Baratheon) u idang( izang) nu inaay a tademaw sa, u wawana nu mekeliday nu bandanbangan, u pucuday a kaka ni Ekun ci Malpacaway. i Nabalulucu'an a malpacawan sa, mipatay tu i sadikuday a mikeliday ci Alcila, pabelien ci Ekun i ci Aliw hananay. namakatukuh tu i Elis ci milibaki sa, napademec tu i laluma'an nu Stak acu laluma'an nu Alin sananay. sisa, malamikeliday namakayda. daw( izaw) ku makeliday a laluma'an sa, u laluma'an nu Panlus, laluma'an nu Talan, laluma'an nu Baleyliong. u multi nu heni sa, u situpelay a macelahay a ngabul kamu nu heni: nabalucu'an nu mita.( Amilika a kamu: ours is the fury.) laylay nu laluma'an nu Palatiyun u sasabaay a laluma'an nu pituway a knatal, u laylay nu heni namakay i tulu a lasubu a mihcan hananay, ci Awlis ku malingatuway, u sasakapahayay a hitay ni Ekun Takelian, malecaday ku wama sakyami. micidekay atu lalangawan ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Palatiyun Lop palatiyung Stanis Palatiyung Lanli Palatiyung Silin Palatiyung malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan nasulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2019. u Wipsay nu misulitay ci Georgr RR Martin manamuhay a Wikipayke dadiw nu sulda atu lamal
S.PHON: dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika: a soŇč of i ¶…ô and fir…ô), u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u kuŇčku nu nir~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaaj nadat…ôŇčan. izaw ku pituaj a pu nu ur~…ĺi ¶ nu nida. mar~…ĺagiki nu ńßbo i **** a mińß ¶aan. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßous…ô of baratńß…ôon) u idaŇč( izaŇč) nu inaaj a tad…ômaw sa, u wawana nu m…ôk…ôr~…ĺidaj nu bandanbaŇčan, u pu ¶udaj a kaka ni …ôkun ¶i mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj. i nabar~…ĺur~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a mar~…ĺpa ¶awan sa, mipataj tu i sadikudaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ar~…ĺ ¶ir~…ĺa, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ¶i …ôkun i ¶i ar~…ĺiw ńßananaj. namakatukuńß tu i …ôr~…ĺis ¶i mir~…ĺibaki sa, napad…ôm…ô ¶ tu i r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak a ¶u r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu ar~…ĺin sananaj. sisa, mar~…ĺamik…ôr~…ĺidaj namakajda. daw( izaw) ku mak…ôr~…ĺidaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an sa, u r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu panr~…ĺus, r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tar~…ĺan, r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺioŇč. u mur~…ĺti nu ńß…ôni sa, u situp…ôr~…ĺaj a ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańßaj a Ňčabur~…ĺ kamu nu ńß…ôni: nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an nu mita.( amir~…ĺika a kamu: ours is tńß…ô furj.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu par~…ĺatijun u sasabaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu pituwaj a knatar~…ĺ, u r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ńß…ôni namakaj i tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an ńßananaj, ¶i awr~…ĺis ku mar~…ĺiŇčatuwaj, u sasakapańßajaj a ńßitaj ni …ôkun tak…ôr~…ĺian, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku wama sakjami. mi ¶id…ôkaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu par~…ĺatijun r~…ĺop par~…ĺatijuŇč stanis par~…ĺatijuŇč r~…ĺanr~…ĺi par~…ĺatijuŇč sir~…ĺin par~…ĺatijuŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan nasur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****. u wipsaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorgr ** martin manamuńßaj a wikipajk…ô dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ
S.FORM: dadiw nu sulda atu lamal(Amilika: A Song of Ice and Fire), u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u kungku nu nilalamelan nu laylay atu malawlaay nadatengan. izaw ku pituay a pu nu ulic nu nida. malagiki nu HBO i 2011 a mihcaan. (Amilika a kamu: House of Baratheon) u idang( izang) nu inaay a tademaw sa, u wawana nu mekeliday nu bandanbangan, u pucuday a kaka ni Ekun ci Malpacaway. i Nabalulucu'an a malpacawan sa, mipatay tu i sadikuday a mikeliday ci Alcila, pabelien ci Ekun i ci Aliw hananay. namakatukuh tu i Elis ci milibaki sa, napademec tu i laluma'an nu Stak acu laluma'an nu Alin sananay. sisa, malamikeliday namakayda. daw( izaw) ku makeliday a laluma'an sa, u laluma'an nu Panlus, laluma'an nu Talan, laluma'an nu Baleyliong. u multi nu heni sa, u situpelay a macelahay a ngabul kamu nu heni: nabalucu'an nu mita.( Amilika a kamu: ours is the fury.) laylay nu laluma'an nu Palatiyun u sasabaay a laluma'an nu pituway a knatal, u laylay nu heni namakay i tulu a lasubu a mihcan hananay, ci Awlis ku malingatuway, u sasakapahayay a hitay ni Ekun Takelian, malecaday ku wama sakyami. micidekay atu lalangawan ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Palatiyun Lop palatiyung Stanis Palatiyung Lanli Palatiyung Silin Palatiyung malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan nasulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2019. u Wipsay nu misulitay ci Georgr RR Martin manamuhay a Wikipayke dadiw nu sulda atu lamal
S.PHON: dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika: a soŇč of i ¶…ô and fir…ô), u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u kuŇčku nu nir~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaaj nadat…ôŇčan. izaw ku pituaj a pu nu ur~…ĺi ¶ nu nida. mar~…ĺagiki nu ńßbo i **** a mińß ¶aan. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßous…ô of baratńß…ôon) u idaŇč( izaŇč) nu inaaj a tad…ômaw sa, u wawana nu m…ôk…ôr~…ĺidaj nu bandanbaŇčan, u pu ¶udaj a kaka ni …ôkun ¶i mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj. i nabar~…ĺur~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a mar~…ĺpa ¶awan sa, mipataj tu i sadikudaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ar~…ĺ ¶ir~…ĺa, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ¶i …ôkun i ¶i ar~…ĺiw ńßananaj. namakatukuńß tu i …ôr~…ĺis ¶i mir~…ĺibaki sa, napad…ôm…ô ¶ tu i r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak a ¶u r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu ar~…ĺin sananaj. sisa, mar~…ĺamik…ôr~…ĺidaj namakajda. daw( izaw) ku mak…ôr~…ĺidaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an sa, u r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu panr~…ĺus, r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tar~…ĺan, r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺioŇč. u mur~…ĺti nu ńß…ôni sa, u situp…ôr~…ĺaj a ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańßaj a Ňčabur~…ĺ kamu nu ńß…ôni: nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an nu mita.( amir~…ĺika a kamu: ours is tńß…ô furj.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu par~…ĺatijun u sasabaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu pituwaj a knatar~…ĺ, u r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ńß…ôni namakaj i tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an ńßananaj, ¶i awr~…ĺis ku mar~…ĺiŇčatuwaj, u sasakapańßajaj a ńßitaj ni …ôkun tak…ôr~…ĺian, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku wama sakjami. mi ¶id…ôkaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu par~…ĺatijun r~…ĺop par~…ĺatijuŇč stanis par~…ĺatijuŇč r~…ĺanr~…ĺi par~…ĺatijuŇč sir~…ĺin par~…ĺatijuŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan nasur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****. u wipsaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorgr ** martin manamuńßaj a wikipajk…ô dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ
